untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of volatility at 1st or 100th percentile with directional reversal confirmation. The allowed indicators (hvol_20) provide volatility magnitude but lack percentile-based thresholds and explicit reversal detection logic. Percentile calculations and reversal direction determination are not expressible with the available indicator set and operators.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using hvol_20 as extreme volatility proxy: low values (<0.01) approximate 1st percentile, high values (>0.03) approximate 100th percentile. Reversal approximated by comparison to previous bar. However, this does not capture the true percentile-based detection or the signal's specific reversal confirmation requirement. Author-silent exit conditions interpreted as volatility mean-reversion exit.
